confidence.label: Data Confidence
confidence.desc_high: High confidence in this MCA result. Based on robust, exact-match market baselines and significant live job volume.
confidence.desc_medium: Moderate confidence in this MCA result. Based on related market averages or a limited sample of live job listings.
confidence.desc_low: Low confidence in this MCA result. Relies heavily on broad economic baselines due to limited specific data.

live.label: Live Market Demand
live.description: How you compare to current live job listings in the market

micro.label: Role Benchmark
micro.description: How you compare to official government data for direct peers

macro.label: National Economy Baseline
macro.description: How you compare to the broader national average across all occupations
